Headline: #53 Pulaski Temporary Reroute at Pulaski/Arthington
ShortDescription: 53 Pulaski buses are temporarily rerouted via Pulaski, Roosevelt, Independence Blvd, Jackson and Pulaski due to, police activity near Pulaski/Arthington.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#53 Pulaski buses are temporarily rerouted via Pulaski, Roosevelt, Independence Blvd, Jackson and Pulaski due to, police activity near Pulaski/Arthington.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Forest Park- Bound Blue Line Delays
ShortDescription: Forest Park- Bound Blue Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier sick rider at Montrose. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Forest Park- Bound Blue Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier sick rider at Montrose.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
